note: Builder-measured FULL-SUITE test count BEFORE the conduct --resume parked-decision-recovery change (98 files, all passing). The full-suite no-decrease requirement (contract assertion 19 / verify step 3) is: the `Tests N passed` count reported by `npm test` MUST be >= this floor. This is a FLOOR, not an exact pin — the count only ever grows as tests are added. Bump this floor only when intentionally REMOVING tests, never to chase an exact current count.
